Hi Simone, this is Mark Pearson from the buyer's legal team. I tried to reach you twice this morning, but I could not get through, so I am leaving a voicemail. I am calling about the share purchase agreement. We have two open points before the signing call on Friday. First, the indemnity clause still needs a final number. Second, the closing date moved, so the timeline in section four is now wrong. I will be available after two o'clock today. Please call me back when you can, and if the connection is bad, just send me a quick message and we can switch to a video call. Thanks, and talk soon.

Hi, this is Simone. I am leaving a quick voicemail for the team after my video call with Mark. The connection was a little weak at the start, so we had to speak up and repeat a few points, but in the end everything was clear. Here is the summary. We agreed on the indemnity number, and Mark will send the revised section four this afternoon. The signing call is still on Friday at ten. One action for us: please prepare the final timeline so we do not hold up the closing. If you cannot reach me later, leave a voicemail and I will call you back. Thank you, and have a good day.

Mark cannot reach Simone, so he leaves a voicemail. Simone calls Mark back and opens the video call. The connection is weak, so they speak up and clarify the open points. They agree on the indemnity number and the new timeline. Simone closes the call and leaves a voicemail update for her team.
